case_title: GONZALES, JUAN CARLOS VS LOPEZ, SALVADOR- EL FAROLITO TAQUERIA

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY GONZALES, JUAN CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SALVADOR- EL FAROLITO TAQUERIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALES, JUAN CARLOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SALVADOR- EL FAROLITO TAQUERIA NO WRITTEN CONTRACT. PLTF NOT A LICENSED CONTRAC- TOR AND NO PROOF OF VALUE OF SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT TO SALVADOR LOPEZ RETURNED SIGNED.
